steps.title: Calculate the quantity sold at the new price
steps.content:
The price increases by \$11 - \$8 = \$3.

For every \$1 price increase, 7 fewer bags are sold:
$$3 \times 7 = 21 \text{ fewer bags}$$
New quantity at \$11:
$$90 - 21 = 69 \text{ bags}$$

steps.title: Calculate revenue at the new price
steps.content:
Revenue = price $\times$ number sold:
$$11 \times 69 = 759$$
The estimated revenue is 759 dollars.
